description_long: This is a modern, rectangular console cabinet with a dark wood finish and two light-colored drawers on the upper right side. The left side features an open cubby space, while the right side is enclosed, creating a visually balanced asymmetry. The drawers have metallic handles, adding a touch of contemporary style. The top and sides are smoothly curved, giving the piece a sleek, continuous form. The open cubby and the flat top surface provide ample space for storage or display. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, hallways, or office waiting areas.
description: A modern, dark wood console cabinet with two light drawers and an open cubby on one side. Features metallic handles and a sleek, curved design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two light-colored drawers with metallic handles and an open cubby on the left.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid, curved dark wood panel with no visible drawers or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cabinet, with the structure of the drawers and cubby visible but no handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid, curved dark wood panel.
